name: Dinner Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Canned tomatoes, drained and chopped.
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine potatoes, onion, celery, salt, and boiling water in a deep kettle.
2. Simmer until tender, about 15 minutes.
3. Heat oil and stir in flour until smooth.
4. Add the next four ingredients while stirring.
5. Cook until thickened.
6. Add cheese and stir all into the potato mixture.
7. Add parsley and tomatoes.
8. Heat through but not boil.
